productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Tamira Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue denim pedal pushers made of 100% cotton with a washed look, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with stitch and panel detailing, folded hems with red twill tape detailing and polka dotted band on the inseam of the waist bandFittingRegular Waist - 22-24 inches Wash care Machine wash Cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detachable accessories Get ready to indulge your little girl in happy feelings in these blue denim pedal pushers from gini and jony. Team this with white or pink tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
